plans.name: Marathon Training: Advanced 2
plans.author: Hal Higdon
plans.description: An advanced 18-week marathon training plan focused on building mileage, tempo runs, and race-pace workouts.

meta.target_audience: Experienced runners with prior marathon experience

plans.name: Marathon Advantage: 55–70 Miles/Week
plans.author: Pete Pfitzinger
plans.description: A competitive marathon plan using mesocycles to develop endurance, lactate threshold, and race-specific fitness.

meta.target_audience: Competitive runners comfortable with 50+ miles per week

plans.name: Olympic Triathlon: Intermediate
plans.author: Training Peaks
plans.description: A 16-week intermediate triathlon plan covering swim, bike, and run with brick workouts in the final build phase.

meta.target_audience: Athletes who can swim 1500m, bike 40km, and run 10km separately
